race.description: Country Music Raceday On Sale Now Hcp (70)
race.comment: AUTOMNE TREE (4) appreciated the drop in grade when second-up last start, closing well to take out a Class 1 over 1350m at this track. Like the set-up of a mile third-up with the blinkers coming off. Not a strong race by Saturday standards so he looks a great chance to get the job done again. SPECIAL ARTIST (9) has a lot of duck eggs next to his name but he has mixed it with far better horses through the course of the carnival. Gets a couple of gear changes on a seven-day back-up. No surprise if his form spiked today. DIAMOND SHOW (11) has hit the line with gusto in her two runs this time in work, most recently getting up for second over 1400m at Eagle Farm. At her best over the mile and should be cherry ripe now. KRUMAC (12) has been beaten narrowly at his last two outings, albeit in easier races than this. Gets some weight relief and draws a nice gate so he should be competitive again. BOLLINGER MISS (10) hasn't been far away of late and deserves each-way consideration.
